sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14898" key="a)rgurwruxei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀργῠρ-ωρῠχεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n14898.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">silver-mine,</tr_> Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg001.perseus-grc1:100" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.100</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
